active.technique: 1:1 honey and sugar syrup. Mix together, no heating required.

active.name: Moscow Mule

active.name: Rhubarb Syrup
active.technique: 1:1 sugar syrup and rhubarb. Stew rhubarb in sugar syrup until soft, keep the rhubarb kompot for texture.

active.name: Spice Mix
active.technique: 12 cut chilli + 1l honey + 1l sugar syrup + 15g sichuan pepper + 45g black pepper. Blend for 1 minute, mill for 1 minute, strain 5-6 times.

active.name: Velvet Reve
active.technique: Stirred with ice, strained, served without ice

premixSpec.batch_note:
4 parts non alcoholic amaretto
2 parts rhubarb syrup
2 parts arensbak red
3 parts versjus

archived.name: Ernst Cardamom Syrup
archived.technique: 10 lightly crushed cardamom pods per 1l sugar syrup. Simmer for 10 minutes, steep for 20 minutes off heat, then strain.
